sourcePath.name: Philadelphia Licenses & Inspections building permits via OpenDataPhilly / Carto SQL API
sourcePath.whyStrongerForPennsylvania: Official municipal L&I permit rows expose contractorname on recent residential/new-construction building permits, producing permit-backed builder/developer candidates instead of generic directory leads.
sourcePath.conversionMethod: Query phl.carto.com permits where permitissuedate >= 2024-01-01, permitdescription includes BUILDING, work/scope indicates new construction/dwelling language, and residential/dwelling terms are present; group by contractorname, sort by permit count, emit builder_signals rows with sample permits and sourceUrls.
sourcePath.caveat: Rows are permit-backed buyer-discovery candidates; company contact URLs/phones/emails remain unresolved unless explicitly present and must be enriched before outreach.
